title: Floral Crispy Kenyan Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and energizing Kenyan dish featuring gochugaru and a floral twist, perfect for a dinner or snack. The combination of crispy exterior and juicy interior makes for a delicious meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together gochugaru, lemon juice, olive oil, honey, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Dip each skewer into the gluten-free flour, shaking off excess.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle the dried rose petals over the chicken skewers.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and cooked through.
